subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up after the conference. I'd be happy to get a meeting on the calendar to explore how we might work together.

Please share a few options for next week, and I'll confirm what works on our side.

Regarding direct contact details for senior leadership, I'm not able to share those externally. I'm happy to coordinate any senior-level discussions through this channel and can ensure the right people are included at the appropriate time.

Looking forward to reconnecting!

Best regards
